name: k/d + j/d chicken & vegetable stew dog food
description: nutrition has been the cornerstone of long-term support for pets with kidney conditions. nutrition can also play a key role in managing dog's mobility, reducing clinical signs and improving weight-bearing ability in dogs. reduced phosphorus & sodium, enriched with omega-3 fatty acids, glucosamine & chondroitin sulfate activbiome+ kidney defenseactivates the gut microbiome to reduce harmful waste products with optimized levels of essential amino acids and high quality protein to help keep them strong texture and delicious flavor to entice even the pickiest of eaters
